entry.title: Re: Some issues with the SuccessFactors Microsoft Teams i...
entry.content: Hello @jsysel, if you click supported commands for quick actions or learn more, it will take you to a help.sap guide which lists all available actions and configuration options. Our end users shouldn't see these guides or they are going to get confused. Not only will it suggest actions that they cannot use, but it will show potential functionality that we dont' yet have set up. Like your screenprint, the actions listed out are specific to our instance, but since there are two hyperlinks to an external guide that lists all the actions, it is still confusing

entry.title: Re: Some issues with the SuccessFactors Microsoft Teams i...
entry.content: Hi, I understand, I think this is more for influence portal than anything else. As this enhancement needs to be implemented by SAP into the teams app.

entry.title: Unable to see the negative values for the Reversed Material
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings of the day!!

In the application "Material document Overview", all the postings of materials are in positive values which may be goods receipts, goods postings and goods reversals. 

Receipts of goods, good issues and Reversals can be identified only by the movement type. There is no identification of negative sign for reversals as there is a identification in MB51 in ECC version.

Are there any hidden settings to turn on the signs for the quantity's that are reversed (means for 262 movements) if not please help with the suitable application which has signs for the Reversed material.

 

Regards,

Yaswanth. 

MM Purchasing 

MM Inventory Management

entry.title: What is the best choice for integration?
entry.content:
I have a scenario where the customer has either SAP B1 or else SAP S4HANA backend systems. The requirement is to somehow extract data from these systems so that they can be used in 3rd party reporting tools. For example, an automated job will run nightly for the transaction mb51(materials management) transaction. This report(or at least the data from the report) needs to be integrated to 3rd party reporting tools like, for example, Power BI. Which of the following options would best help me achieve this -

  1. SAP PO

  2. SAP CPI

  3. ODBC Connectors

  4. DVW

  5. Some other tool...?

Thanks,

Atul Prabhudesai

entry.title: New MSTeams app home page
entry.content:
Has it shown up for anyone yet? It was supposed to be in the weekends release

Home Page of the SAP SuccessFactors App in Microsoft Teams | SAP Help Portal

But its not in mine yet. And yes, I have the latest experience version

entry.title: Re: Unloading data from a SAP Build Apps VCF backend to CSV files
entry.content:
Hi @fvettore64 !

First of all, good blog! Unfortunately I can't get it done (nothing happens when I click unload data button).

I think the JavaScript is where I'm missed out. What is the output for it (the JavaScript)? I'm aware of the input is coming from data variable (ObjectLists) but not quite sure for the output. Currently my output is the default one (result with text property)

Best regards,
Isyraf

entry.title: Re: Getting error while adding STO based delivery to the...
entry.content: As I already asked, please share the warning message number.

entry.title: Re: Buttons in custom column of list report fiori elements
entry.content: You can defined a expression binding or model to the visible property of the Button, Ideally it should work. Also, If you can tell us more about the logic, based on which you want to enable/disable the button.

entry.title: Re: Joining us from the AppGyver Forum? Start here in the SAP Builders Group!
entry.content:
Hi @EsmeeX, I'm very glad to hear that. I'm actually interested in all Appgyver forum content as you could find almost all answers and solutions on it. If you warned community it's going to be removed i would happily map and download all it's content.

Can you tell whats the time frame its going to be available online again?

Is it possible you could share a link to the content of it so we could download it before it's back online again?

Thank you for all your effort.

Kind Regards

Mike

entry.title: Re: Customizing Material Master – Adding new tab/sub-screen in MM01 / MM02 / MM03
entry.content:
Hello  Everyone

I followed all the steps and created the sub-screen.

When I add a text, it saves the text to the text object of the screen I copied. Am I missing a step?
I want to assign it to a custom text object I just created. Is there an customization or any solution for this, how can I solve it?

Thanks in advance,

Hasan

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services

I have taken picture from weekly Belgian magazine

Extraction of ingredients is going well.  I tried to split quanty and unit of measurement. But I am still looking for the best prompt.

 

@noravonthenen 

Is there a way to extract multiple tables ?
One table with ingredients and one table with preparation steps?

entry.title: how to fix The import org.owasp cannot be resolved"
entry.content: how to fix "The import org.owasp cannot be resolved" while importing "<%@ page import="org.owasp.esapi.ESAPI" in NWDS - jsp file

entry.title: Copy inspection results option is disable mode
entry.content:
I am trying to copy inspection results from one lot to another lot during the inspection lot processing, but the 'Copy Inspection Results' option is disabled.

Can you please let me know how to enable it?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Copy inspection results option is disable mode
entry.content: Please check the online resource Copy Inspection Results and section Prerequisites for how to enable the functionality in S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: Maintain the fields on the correspondence form
entry.content:
Hi JessJSilaen,

As you noted, that function WordNum is designed by Adobe to only convert to English (https://help.adobe.com/en_US/AEMForms/6.1/DesignerFormCalcRef/WS92d06802c76abadb-32254d55129f5ee7c98-7f95.2.html)

"Returns the English text equivalent of a given number."

If you look in the FormCalc reference, only English is supported 

"As of this release, it is not possible to specify a locale identifier other than English for this function"

It's not an uncommon ask, there are several looking for the same thing since at least 2010... there is even a SAP knowledge base article on it

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3380539

 

Have you considered to code it yourself in FormCalc or Javascript? (i had to once do a bubble sort for a table in a similar manner)

Similar to what they did here (sorry for the external link), see the Self Impementation: https://ourcodeworld.com/articles/read/353/how-to-convert-numbers-to-words-number-spelling-in-javascript#google_vignette

which draws on this example: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/14766951/transform-numbers-to-words-in-lakh-crore-system

The only other option is maybe define a custom field and use developer extensibility or side-by-side extensibility to update the custom field and pass it to the form.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: SQL workbench (history)
entry.content:
Jim,

Under Administrator>Tools>Workbench History, you will find the history of all queries (not just yours).

https://help.sap.com/docs/APM_ICM/d7c8dbefd0e64d75bdc6bf2a2e86b8e7/7884c84cbd944482ae8aa3287af6a84e.html

entry.title: Re: Problem when run command fiori add deploy-config
entry.content: did it install anything? I saw S is in upper case, which is not correct.

entry.content: just use expression binding for the attribute enabled

entry.title: Re: TaxFactory 11.0
entry.content:
BSI released the Vermont Child Care Contributions in TUB 141 using two new tax types:

  • 123 - EE CHILD CARE CONTRIBUTION
  • 124 - ER CHILD CARE CONTRIBUTION

Hopefully we will get the configuration from SAP soon.

Thanks,

Kim

entry.title: SAP Crystal Reports for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the latest version of SAP crystal reports for eclipse?

Please share the SAP support duration for the same.

SAP Crystal Reports, version for Eclipse 

 

Thanks...

entry.title: SAP RAP - Trigger determination on save without field changes
entry.content:
Hi,

I've a RAP-based app - Managed, Draft enabled.

I've a determination at the parent entity level

determination updateInvoice on save { create; update; }

So I expect the determination to trigger on save whenever I hit save in the edit mode. The problem is the determination only triggers if I update/change the value of at least one field before hitting save.

I would like to have the determination trigger on save irrespective of whether I update any fields or not. How can I achieve that? Is there a way I can insert a dummy entity update somewhere after the user hits save to force-trigger the determination?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Crystal reports for Eclipse - support
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using SAP crystal reports for eclipse jars of version 12.2.231.5147.

Till when these jars are supported?

 

Thanks,

 

(https://origin-az.softwaredownloads.sap.com/public/file/0020000001532392023)

entry.title: Re: BCM XML payment file not generated in BNK_MONIP
entry.content:
Please check your workflow settings.

check that the following entries are maintained in SM30 with view V_TBCA_RTW_LINK:
BNK_COM 01 50100024 50100021
BNK_COM 02 50100024 50100022
BNK_COM 03 50100024 50100023
BNK_INI 01 50100024 31000004

Also check if there is any error message in SWI2_DIAG.

entry.title: How to import data via Integration Center that has commas
entry.content:
Hi - 

I am trying to update Requisition data via Integration Center but am running into an issue with commas in my CSV file. When I upload a sample CSV file to the IC job, the data 'breaks' where there is a comma in the values and everything shifts to a new column. The data in my CSV file does have double quotes around the values that have commas, but IC doesn't seem to respect these double quote and 'breaks' the data wherever a comma is present. Is it possible to have valid commas in the data of your input file? If so, how can I get this to work?

 

Thanks

entry.title: How to renew the Subaccount certificate in SAP Cloud Connector?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

SAP Cloud Connector Certificate of our subaccount will expire. It needs to be renewed.
Could you please help to renew it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to renew the Subaccount certificate in SAP Cloud...
entry.content:
Hello,

This is Vinícius from SAP BTP support team.

My understanding is that:
You want steps on how to renew the subaccount certificate in SAP Cloud Connector.

--Research--

  • Search Terms: SCC Refresh subaccount
    • 2950537 - Subaccount certificate expired from SAP Cloud Connector
    • 2932205 - Unable to refresh Neo subaccount certificate on Cloud Connector

--Solution--

You need to refresh the subaccount as described in 2950537 - Subaccount certificate expired from SAP Cloud Connector

If you face any issues, then carefully review 2932205 - Unable to refresh Neo subaccount certificate on Cloud Connector

If issue still persists, open a case in BC-MID-SCC team and provide:

  1. SCC logs
  2. Screenshot from the error message
  3. The User you are using for this
  4. The outcomes from checking the KBA

Wishing you a pleasant week!😉
Vini
SAP Support
BTP Integrations & Foundation Services | BTP Foundation Technologies

entry.title: Integrate an SAPUI5 App to SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hey all.

I was checking the content from tutorial "Integrate an SAPUI5 App to SAP Build Work Zone" and I have a question: Is it possible to use this approach to import and maintain all kinds of SAPUI5 apps? Even those created from my S4H on-premise system?

Best Regards,
Mauricio

entry.title: Re: APM/APMe Security groups details
entry.content: Hi, K.A., Let me do some digging around and see what I can come up with to help you.

entry.title: Upgrading to SAP GUI 800
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Could you just clarify some questions we have?

  1. Any advantages in using different themes for SAPGUI 800?
  2. Any way to defaulting to using SAP Signature theme instead of the Quartz theme when upgrading to SAP GUI 800?
  3. What are the differences of SAP GUI 760 and SAP GUI 800?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to SAP GUI 800
entry.content:
Hello!

  1. Please consult 2541592 - Display issues when using SAP GUI for Windows with high DPI settings, you'll see that some themes are better equipped to handle high DPI scenarios. Kindly check this KBA and apply the theme which better fits you context.
  2. Kindly consult 3315575 - How to change SAP GUI theme for multiple users. You'll see that theme configuration might be set via Windows registry keys, and in case your users already have a theme set in the registry path, then these theme will remain cross-installation.
  3. Please consult 3075781 - New and changed features in SAP GUI for Windows 8.00 and 2796898 - New and changed features in SAP GUI for Windows 7.70, for a list of changes that SAP GUI went through since 760 version.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements Feature Showcase App with RAP for Release 2402 - Why is it late?
entry.content:
Nice!

What a pity that I have to wait a year and a half before I can install these features onPrem with ABAP Plattform 2025.

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Multiple Selection Mode in a Data Table...
entry.content:
Hi Bill Froelich,

Thank you for your suggestion on simulating multi-selection using an image column. I appreciate your detailed response and the workaround you provided. It's an interesting approach, and I have seen your comments on a similar issue in another community post from 2021, which I am already exploring: Multi-selection Table Control.

In our specific scenario, we are building an application for creating sales orders with added features, where users need to select multiple products and update various details inline, such as quantities. While implementing the image column to simulate selection can work, it doesn't fully address our need to allow inline editing of these fields directly within the table. 

Here's a sample picture illustrating our requirement for editable fields within the table, 

Additionally, we have an action column intended for delete and copy operations. However, since the control only supports row-level events and lacks cell-level press events, implementing these actions through the action column is challenging. As an alternative, we could introduce multi-select functionality through a work around and add separate buttons at the header level to perform these actions.

Additionally, as far as my understanding goes, enabling the edit mode for the table makes all fields editable, and we currently do not have options to restrict editability to specific columns. Do we have options over making specific columns editable while keeping others non-editable?

The current limitation of redrawing the entire Data Table upon selection adds complexity, especially when users need to make quick updates to multiple rows. We need a solution that not only simulates multi-selection but also supports selective inline editing of fields like product quantities and other related details.

Any further suggestions on how we can achieve this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you once again for your support and insights.

Best regards,
Vivek V

entry.title: Re: Review Business Role Changes before a Major Upgrade in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Gabriel,

Thanks for your suggestion. I rechecked the link and it works. This could be a temporarily problem. 

Regards,

George

entry.title: CV profile activation for group valuation
entry.content:
While activating CV profile I am getting error as No Leading Ledger found. But when i am checking FINSC_Ledger T code, I see that leading ledger is assigned.

Any help is appreciated.

 

Thanks

Kishore Jain

entry.title: Consume ODATA v4 API within the same S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I am trying to consume an ODATA v4.0 standard SAP API within the same S4HANA Cloud system.  I followed the instructions as per the SAP Help.

I created a proxy, outbound services, service consumption model, communication scenarios etc.  I created the communication arrangement and able to check connection successfully in the arrangement.

 I am using the code generated in the service consumption model.  When I tried to use the proxy in the ABAP code in the ADT, I am getting an error :

The remote service has raised a Client Error '404': 'Not Found'

 

Please help to consume this service - either using Local Proxy class or Remote Proxy class. 

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: In the process code, do we have any option to trigger event when the IDoc is success
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In the process code, do we have any option to trigger event when the  Inbound IDoc is success, to notify a agent configured in workflow.

In our case we want to notify the agent when order is placed

entry.title: Re: Unable to reverse supplier invoice
entry.content: Hi, if you are sure you have maintained the business place in configuration, then I would open a customer case and let the colleagues have a look into it. Best, Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: CV profile activation for group valuation
entry.content:
Hi Kishore,

 

have you checked if any of these SAP notes may help you?

 

1565231 Deactivating a ledger 

1229202 Subsequent implementation of an additional ledger 

1399193 ICR: Data Selection: FB_ICRC105: Define a leading ledger 

1623306 Message in Customizing for non-leading ledgers 

760908 OADB: No check of leading ledger 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

eDocument (General) for DRC in Public Cloud: Handle Incoming Messages
When I run it, I get an error as follows. How can I solve this?
No file type for message type TR_RECEIPT_PULL found in the EDOMSGTYPEPULL view
Thanks everyone

entry.title: Re: S4CO1: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Exercises

entry.title: Where to install SAP GUI for MAC OS environment?
entry.content:
Where to install SAP GUI for MAC OS environment?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Where to install SAP GUI for MAC OS environment?
entry.content:
Hello,

For MAC OS or similar you'll need to install SAP GUI for Java, which can be found through 3241657 - Where to download Sap GUI for JAVA.

entry.title: Re: WSAECONNRESET: Connection reset by peer. Multiple use...
entry.content:
Hello @tscott 

did you find corresponding entries in SM21 does it shows any sessions deleted (DP_SOFTCANCEL)?

See the different disconnetc types in that note:

2827908 - Delete session, reason DP_SOFTCANCEL

it helped us to dentify issues on different locations with weak wlan repeater.

Further note (and notes inside that note):

2507582 - 10054: WSAECONNRESET: Connection reset by peer

Can you recall what happened 5 months ago when it started? Kernel Upgrade? New SAP GUi? Parameter change? Network changes?

Good luck with NIPING

Cheers

entry.title: Re: How Business Warehouse can help you in IBP Projects
entry.content: Hi, thanks for sharing your experience in integrating BW to IBP. Do you have also experience in using BEx query as source for integrating data from BW to IBP? If this is not available as an option, what is your recommendation in putting the logic that are built already in BEx queries? Shall we replicate the logic in any of the available extractors? Can you share some best practices? Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Availability of "Overall Mean Score" and "Mean" in Report Story LMS
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm seeking some insights regarding the "Overall Mean Score" and "Mean" information in SAP SuccessFactors Learning Management System (LMS), specifically in Report Story LMS.

Background: We currently have a report in LMS that provides follow-up survey information. This report displays valuable information on-screen, including the "Mean" and "Overall Mean" scores, which are crucial for our team to evaluate learner performance and determine if they meet the required criteria for course completion.

Challenge: The issue we face is that this report only presents the data on-screen and doesn't allow us to export it to CSV. This limitation makes it challenging for our team to analyze who did not achieve the necessary mean score for approval efficiently.

We reached out to our SAP support team, and they mentioned that creating a custom report in LMS via Plateau Report Designer would be possible but resource-intensive. Additionally, they indicated that SAP plans to integrate LMS data into Report Story, which might eventually include the fields we need.

Question: Before we commit resources to develop a custom report, I would like to know if there are any plans to include the "Overall Mean Score" and "Mean" information in Report Story LMS. Is there a roadmap or timeline available for when these fields might be integrated into Report Story? Any insights or guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
José Vitor

entry.title: Is the mixed costing functionality an option or available for the cloud public edition?
entry.content:
We do a few parts we buy or make and subcontract as well. For cost estimate, we would like to explore mixed costing to get accurate estimates . Is mixed costing available for the cloud public edition?  I have searched the community and KBA's. I was not able to find anything useful. Please advise.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 3
entry.content: Here's my submission:

entry.title: Re: Generate Video Presets
entry.content:
Hi,

I don't have a straightforward answer for you but you could try:

1. When you start generating video in Producer - Tools > Generate Video - try clicking the Settings button beside the Presets field

 2. When in the Settings, you can try different resolutions, refresh rates and even select a different Codec to generate the video
3. As a starting point, I would use 16:9 resolution sizes, given that the original content was created at 1920 x 1080, because I suspect that choosing a 4:3 resolution ration could introduce blurriness.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Log based replication to HANA cloud with SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content: Remote table replication solution using Cloud connector is for HANA database only. for other applications, SDI with DP agent adapters is used.

entry.title: Brazil nota fiscal inbound vs outbound
entry.content:
Hi NF-e experts,

I am looking for experience feedback on how to organize support for nota fiscal.

My CIO (based in the USA) has this "great" idea that since both inbound and outbound invoices are named "nota fiscal", it should be the same group of people who support (bug fixing, enhancements) both inbound invoices and outbound invoices.

My understanding is that inbound invoices are usually supported by people who have a MM-PUR background, while outbound invoices are supported by people with more of a SD/OTC background. I am not saying that people with both skillsets do not exist, but as far as I know they tend to be the exception more than the norm.

Do you have experience of a single team supporting both inbound and outbound invoices, or is the standard way of doing things splitting the responsbility? Thanks for your feedback!

entry.title: Re: Steampunk is going all-in
entry.content:
Hi,

How to configure Embedded Steampunk on S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 - RISE Private Cloud?

After install ADT, how create a  abap cloud project  type S/4HANA  cloud abap  environment? What´s abap service instance url?

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2023
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In TUB 141 we have Vermont Child Care Contribution Special Fund, Where employee are subjected to 2 new tax types which is listed below.

EE CHILD CARE CONTRIBUTION: TAX TYPE 123.
ER CHILD CARE CONTRIBUTION: TAX TYPE 124.

Please do let me know when SAP is planning on releasing these 2 new tax types.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Hemanthkumar

entry.title: Re: Steampunk is going all-in
entry.content:
Hi,

You can check the site developers.sap.com . There is several tutorials to start a project, with installation ADT, connection, etc.

Other link relevant is the next: https://community.sap.com/t5/developer-extensibility/developer-enablement-resources-for-developer-extensibility/ta-p/227194 

regards

entry.title: Purchase request function not showing in SAP Business One client
entry.content:
Hi ALl,

 

I am experiencing an issue where I cannot see the Purchase Request function in the SAP Business One web client (B1 Version: 10.0.190.FPO2202). I noticed this while testing some approval processes. Additionally, I believe this issue is related to the fact that the approval pending notification is popping up, but nothing is opening. When I tried the same process with a Purchase Order, it worked fine. I have checked the setup to see if there are any specific settings or authorizations required separately for the web client, but I couldn't find anything.

 

Looking forward to your expertise on this at the earliest.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2023
entry.content:
Hello @graziela ,

Alabama DOR proposes tax exempt overtime wages (/PPE) be reported in box 14 on the W-2. Its not clear if this is required. Will SAP be providing a solution for this?

Thanks,

Mae

entry.title: Re: OData services stopped working after deployment of plugin
entry.content:
@naveenvishal

Let me confirm the following points:

  • Is it only the /User API that fails to connect out of the two APIs (/User, /Background_SpecialAssign)?
  • You mentioned that errors occur in the "production" environment. By "production," do you mean the Cloud Foundry Runtime, or do you mean that it only fails in the prod environment among multiple Cloud Foundry Runtime environments (dev, qas, prod)?
  • Do you see any error logs in the backend ? (by command `cf logs <your-service-name> --recent')

entry.title: Supplier Invoice Line Copy
entry.content: Is there any functionality in the supplier network where a supplier could copy an existing invoice line vs. creating new each time?  Doesn't look to be out of the box but is there any customization option?

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Topics
entry.content: @mmoisa I'm sorry but that's not a topic we'd be able to cover with a CodeJam.

entry.title: Re: Posting period locked; specify an alternative date [M...
entry.content: We solved the issue posting two months later on september instead of july which was when the invoice was issued. Also we tried to post on august but the same error appeared.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 2023 FPS00 Upgrade
entry.content:
SAP FIORI FES 2023 FOR S/4HANA, 2023 is not supported as Gateway standalone and needs HANA DB

Also can't upgrade from SAP FIORI FES 2020 to SAP FIORI FES 2023

how did you overcome FES limitations

Regards

entry.title: Re: OData services stopped working after deployment of pl...
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ,

Please find the details:

  • Is it only the /User API that fails to connect out of the two APIs (/User, /Background_SpecialAssign)? The other API I cannot check until we bypass User API call. User API call is before we save to pull SF data and /Background_SpecialAssign when we save the data.
  • You mentioned that errors occur in the "production" environment. By "production," do you mean the Cloud Foundry Runtime, or do you mean that it only fails in the prod environment among multiple Cloud Foundry Runtime environments (dev, qas, prod)? I meant CF Runtime as we have only 1 (Dev) environment where I am test-building the application. 
  • Do you see any error logs in the backend ? (by command `cf logs <your-service-name> --recent') -> Please find attached below the file with errors

Thank you,

Naveen Vishal

entry.title: Re: OData services stopped working after deployment of plugin
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ,

Please find the details:

Is it only the /User API that fails to connect out of the two APIs (/User, /Background_SpecialAssign)? The other API I cannot check until we bypass User API call. User API call is before we save to pull SF data and /Background_SpecialAssign when we save the data.

You mentioned that errors occur in the "production" environment. By "production," do you mean the Cloud Foundry Runtime, or do you mean that it only fails in the prod environment among multiple Cloud Foundry Runtime environments (dev, qas, prod)? I meant CF Runtime as we have only 1 (Dev) environment where I am test-building the application.

Do you see any error logs in the backend ? (by command `cf logs <your-service-name> --recent') -> Please find attached below the file with errors.

Thank you,

Naveen Vishal

entry.title: When migrating sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app.The following warning
entry.content:
Hi All,
When migrating  sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app,
The following warning occurs.
"Sheet Schedule Line Data, column 'Order Quantity in Sales Units' : Row xxx will be truncated during transfer."
(Message Class:DMC_MD_INTERPRETER / Message Number:37)The sales unit for the relevant order is KGM, and the order quantity holds two decimal places.Is it not possible to migrate data if the sales unit is KGM and the order quantity has decimal places?
Please help.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Data Import API
entry.content:
Hi - Am also having the same issue . 

Have also tried populating the JSESSION and VCAP values in the header . 

Am currently implementing this API in ABAP AS - 7.5 .

Please let me know , if you have the solution.

Regards

Srini

entry.title: Mass download billing document pdf output
entry.content:
Hi all,

how can we mass download billing documentd pdf output?

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Mass download billing document pdf output
entry.content:
Dear customer,

In S/4HANA Cloud, we cannot mass download PDF via the UI of the system. However instead, you can consider utilizing the following API service to mass fetch the PDFs of invoices.

Billing Document - Read, Cancel, GetPDF | SAP Help Portal

You can download the PDFs massively by coding a loop logic in your external system.

entry.title: How to disable Background Processing in workflolw setp
entry.content:
Hello guys, I need to add an Expression in my workflow setp but is showing disable:

If I go to control tab I can see the next:

The thing is that if I go to the task, is not setting as Background processing:

could anyone can help me?

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja,

Thanks for this! This will be helpful on our development. I already done the all the configuration and tested SLIN_SEC and FUNCTIONAL_DB as the Check Variant. It all went well but when I tried to create a custom check variant in the Central ATC check system (cloud) that is a copy of SLIN_SEC or FUNCTIONAL_DB, I got an error in the Checked system "Tool failures possibly caused incomplete result - see longtext" Message no. SATC_ABAP_CHECK410. Is there any missing configuration that needs to be done?

Regards,

Manuel

entry.title: Re: CONFIG.READ_CALUCATED_MEMBER_VALUES
entry.content: In system -> About, if you are not seeing a section for 'HANA Cloud version, then it's not on HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: fields ssavd and ssevd operation
entry.content: Have you found a solution? I also have the same problem. If you have found a solution please let me know.

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Multiple Selection Mode in a Data Table...
entry.content: Restricitng editing to a subset of columns is a feature that will be introduced in the next release.

entry.title: Configuration for PR to PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario - 1  I will create sales order and automatically PR will be created. Let's say my supplying plant is A. If plant A has stock then it will allow to create delivery, PGI and billing.

Scenario - 2 I will create sales order and automatically PR will be created. In plant A, there is no stock so stock deficit issue will happen during PGI.

In this 2nd scenario, i want to transfer stock from other plant, let's say Plant B.

So here Plant B is my supplying plant and Plant A is my receiving plant.

With reference to the PR, PO should create and stock transfer should happen plant B to Plant A

Once stock transfer is done,  then I will be able to do PGI for the scenario - 2.

Here storage location is same but different plants in stock transfer process.

NOTE : Scenario - 1 & Scenario - 2 should happen in a single transaction.

Please find below sketch

 

I need complete configuration so as to execute the transaction as per my requirement.

entry.title: Demo mode link appears as a tiny dot in SEN book page
entry.content:
Hi guys,

When I try to insert a Demo Mode Link in a book page, it appears as a red colored tiny dot. I also tried to increase its width and height in Playback settings -> Book Page Fallback Defaults -> Link Buttons -> Demo Mode Link. It is uneditable. Refer below screenshot.

I created a new book page and I can see the Demo Mode Link button. But in this specific book page, we are unable to see it.

Any suggestions please...

entry.title: Re: Working with Object Tables in SAP Mobile Development Kit
entry.content: Thank you! I've recently got the debugger working, and I can see exactly how this works 🙂 Thanks Bill!

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Lists integration with SAP Datasphere
entry.content: @klorn_pallier- not that I am aware of. Be great if there was!

entry.title: Performance impact on database from remote source connection
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

For context, I need to aggregate data across multiple databases into an HDI container. To achieve this, I am creating remote source connections from several databases to a single database. This single database hosts an HDI container that facilitates data aggregation.

Currently, there will be around 4 databases (and corresponding remote source connections), with the possibility of more in the future. These 4 databases will frequently perform INSERT operations, and given that the remote source connections are real-time, these changes will be reflected in the single database as well.

I want to understand if there will be any performance-related issues for the single database under this setup. Any opinions or help would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: The overruling information is reset when an update is done to the delivery document
entry.content:
Hello,

the SAP note: 2845239 - Issues with propagation of blocks from FWO to FU, TU, FO, FB - SAP for Me  , explains the below problem:

After setting the "Overrule Block" checkbox for a propagated block in the Freight Unit / Transportation Unit or Freight Order / Freight Booking, the overruling information is reset when an update is done to the predecessor business document that is the origin of the propagated block.

 

And it's recommended to implement the note for correcting this but this is in "Cannot be implemented" status.

Can anyone help me on this. Actually I am passing the blocking information from delivery to FO and when I make any changes to the delivery (after overruling the block), the overruling indicator is reset and the block again appears in FO.  

 

Thanks

Stalin

entry.title: Re: Extending the ABAP CDS extractor
entry.content:
seems no other way, but you are lucky, only two layers.

not sure if extractor has special way to extend.

entry.title: Re: Process order integration with DMC
entry.content: @ manoelcosta surely will check and revert back !! i Understand no configuration is required with the pre-requisities mentioned in the help, it should get transfered

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

My name is Ryan and I am currently an ERP consultant of a local ERP products of a VN consultant firm. I am pursuing to become of SAP consultant in next year, I think this opportunity would be an amazing way to start me on a new career as an SAP solution designer.


I believe this digital skills initiative is an excellent opportunity to give back and assist others in taking the first step toward transforming their lives. While I am committed to staying motivated in my own learning, I find it even more crucial to pledge to pass on my knowledge and experience, helping to educate others when the opportunity arises.

Thank you for this wonderful opportunity.

Ryan

entry.title: Re: Unlocking the Power of RSUSR_LOCK_USERS Report in SAP
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi Thanks for highlighting/adding this! Thanks for sharing the SAP Notes as well!

This document is very helpful!

I use SAP S4/HANA.

Please suggest how to activate this function. 

Thanks

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition ABAP开发案例之三：使用ADT自定义CDS视图
entry.content:
我们将发布一系列在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 的 ABAP 环境中的开发案例。本篇是该系列的第三个开发案例，使用 ADT 自定义 CDS 视图。在我们开始之前，您可以阅读这篇 Blog 来了解我们这一系列的全部案例，希望我们的 Blog 可以为您在公有云三系统的探索中带来一些有价值的洞察。接下来就让我们开始吧！

1     场景需求

为了将交付、定价、税收和成本信息整合到一个数据模型中，并在嵌入式SAC故事中以表格形式进行可视化，需要创建一个分层的数据模型。在3SL系统之前可以通过Key User Extension 来生成CDS，但是其灵活度远不如直接在ADT中使用Coding开发出来的CDS。

1.1      数据来源I_DeliveryDocumentITEM

在ADT中打开 I_DeliveryDocumentITEM Delivery Document Item，当前CDS主要从Lips取值，并且关联到了许多其他的CDS。

           

 

 

           

 

 

 

1.2      字段定义

直接从底层CDS引用的字段如下：

Output Field

Field Desc

FieldPath

DeliveryDocument

交货

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.DeliveryDocument

DeliveryDocumentItem

项目

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.DeliveryDocumentItem

ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit

销售数量

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit

BaseUnit

计量单位

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.BaseUnit

Product

物料编码

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.Product

ActualGoodsMovementDate

实际货物移动日期

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ActualGoodsMovementDate

SoldToParty

客户（外部）

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.SoldToParty

DeliveryDocumentType

交货类型

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType

ReferenceSDDocumentItem

参考项目

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocumentItem

ReferenceSDDocument

参考凭证

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocument

CustomerName_Sold

客户名称（外部）

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._SoldToParty.CustomerName

ReferenceSDDocumentCategory

参考凭证类别

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocumentCategory

SalesDocumentDate

凭证日期

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._ReferenceSDDocument.SalesDocumentDate

CompanyCode

公司代码

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._SalesOrganization.CompanyCode

SalesOrganization

销售组织

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.SalesOrganization

ValuationArea

评估范围

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._Plant.ValuationArea

Currency

公司代码货币

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._SalesOrganization._CompanyCode.Currency

CustomerName_Ship

客户名称（公司间）

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._ShipToParty.CustomerName

ShipToParty

客户（公司间）

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ShipToParty

TransactionCurrency

凭证货币

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._ReferenceSalesDocumentItem.TransactionCurrency

  新追加的计算字段如下：

Field

Field Desc

Formula

 Customer                    

 客户                        

 case when
   I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.SoldToParty
else I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ShipToParty
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         

 CustomerName                

 客户名称                    

 case when
  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._SoldToParty.CustomerName
else I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._ShipToParty.CustomerName
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        

 SO                          

销售订单                    

 case when
  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocument
else ''
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                

 SOITEM                      

销售订单行项目              

 case when
  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocumentItem
else ''
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            

 PO                           

采购订单                    

 case when
  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then ''
else I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocument
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                

 POITEM                      

采购订单行项目              

 case when `  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'`  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'`then ''`else I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocumentItem`end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            

QuantitySold

销售数量(带符号)

case when

  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'

  or  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LLR'

then

  -1 * I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit

else

  I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit

end

Sign

销售数量符号

case when

  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'

  or  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LLR'

then -1

else 1

end

 

1.3      定义取值范围

Add a filter based on the following expression

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ActualGoodsMovementDate >= $parameters.P_MONTH_STARTDATE

 AND I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ActualGoodsMovementDate <= $parameters.P_MONTH_ENDDATE

 AND(

    I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'

OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'

OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'NLCC'

OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LLR'

)

AND I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit > 0

2     功能实现

2.1      创建Data Definition

首先创建一个Package，右键选择ZLOCAL > New > ABAP Package。

 

 

 

 

填写好Package的Name和Description，勾选Add to favorite packages方便后续查找。点击Next。

 

 

 

 

点击Next > Finish完成Package的创建。

 

 

 

右键创建好的Package，选择Other ABAP Repository Object。

 

 

 

 

输入并选中Data Definition，点击Next进入下一步。

 

 

 

 

输入I_DELIVERYDOCUMENTITEM进行搜索并选中，点击OK。点击Next > Next。

 

 

 

 

            选中Define View Entity，点击Finish完成CDS View的创建。

 

 

2.2      实现Data Definition

按照字段定义实现CDS内容。

 

 

 

 

            新追加的计算字段。

  

 

 

 

            定义取值范围。

 

 

 

 

            完成CDS View内容的填写后，保存，点击上方菜单栏的🕯激活，使类生效。

 

 

 

2.3      查看Data Definition

右键创建的Data Definition，选择Show In > Properties。

 

 

 

 

选中API State，再点击Add Release Contract。

 

 

 

 

选择Use System-Internally (Contract C1)，点击Next。

 

 

 

 

确保Use in Cloud Development和Use in Key User Apps都被勾选，点击Next。

 

 

 

 

 

再点击Next > Finish完成Add Release Contract。

 

 

 

 

在ADT中可以使用Data Preview来查看当前CDS的内容。连接到客户端100，右键创建的CDS View，点击Open With > Data Preview。

 

 

 

 

            在P_MONTH_STARTDATE和P_MONTH_ENDDATE后方按照YYYYMMDD的格式输入8位数字作为日期参数，点击Open Data Preview查看数据。

 

 

 

            根据输入的日期条件，会显示出符合条件的数据。

 

 

 

 

点击Parameter可以修改输入的参数，重新进行数据的筛选。

 

 

 

 

点击SQL Console可以查看进行查询的SQL语句，进行更改后点击Run会重新执行。

 

3. 结语


以上就是本篇开发案例的全部内容。希望该案例能让你更了解如三系统开发拓展的流程，希望您有所收获！

如果您对本文有任何的建议和想法，欢迎在评论区提出，期待与您一起交流。如果本文对您有任何帮助，欢迎您关注我的个人账号，期待我们在下一篇博文再见！

entry.title: Extend Upload Set with Table to Fiori Elements and utilize Object Store
entry.content:
Overview

In this article, I will introduce a sample program for SAP BTP that manages both text and file information. This guide should prove useful for those new to SAP BTP, like myself. Previously I posted Extend Upload Set to Fiori Elements and utilize Document Management Service with minimum TypeScript implementation.

Recently SAP CAP team was implemented @cap-js/attachments plugin that provides out-of-box attachment files support with SAP Object Store service. We do not need TypeScript implementation above using this plugin.

It is quite convenient for us, but I had some trouble in deployment. I would like to note how can I resolve deployment trouble for my follower to prevent such pitfall.

screenshot of sample program

 

  • Text is stored to SAP HANA Cloud database and file is stored to SAP Object Store service respectively.
  • Backend service is implemented by Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) Node.js project.
  • User interface is implemented by Fiori Elements (List Report and Object Page), then automatically extend Object Page with SAPUI5 Upload Set with Table control. 

Sample code is hosted on a GitHub repository, and you are free to copy and experiment with it.

Note: Currently Object Store is available only in Free Tier environment, not in trial environment.

Note: I tested this on AWS subaccount. Maybe not working for other hyper scalers in current plugin version.

 

Development

Most of steps are same as my instruction post Instruction of implement-test-deploy flow for SAPUI5 plus CAP integrated with another services. And it is not difficult for you to follow instruction of @cap-js/attachments plugin. Key differences are:

  • Local testing by `cds watch` is utilizing in-memory database for both text and file. You do not need to setup for hybrid testing. 
  • Custom section to Fiori Elements is not required. Attachment section is automatically extended.
  • Need to use specific SAPUI5 version `1.121`. Both older (1.120.14) and newer (1.124.0) version are not working for the moment. (Memo).

 

Deployment to Cloud Foundry

Deployment configuration is also similar to my previous artifacts.

In production (Cloud Foundry) environment, we will store file object to Object Store (this is Simple Storage Service, aka S3 in AWS). To do this, we will describe Object Store service instance and bind it to Node.js application in `mta.yaml` file.

One more thing to care is `package.json` CDS configuration. To connect to above service instance with CDS, I will write cds properties:

 

 

  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "kinds": {
        "attachments-db": {
          "impl": "@cap-js/attachments/lib/basic"
        },
        "attachments-s3": {
          "impl": "@cap-js/attachments/lib/aws-s3"
        }
      },
      "[production]":{
        ...,
        "attachments": {
          "kind": "s3",
          "vcap": {
            "name": "sap-sample-fiori-elements-uploadset-object-store"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

 

  • `kinds` property is for telling implementation of each kind (`db` is for local development, and `s3` is for production). I copied from here.
  • `vcap` under `attachments` property is for accessing service instance in Cloud Foundry (refer to CAP documentation). Service name should be matched with resource name in `mta.yaml` file. 

After setup configuration has done, you can `mbt build` and `cf deploy` to deploy to Cloud Foundry. You can upload and download files in Fiori Elements like below.

Upload and donwload file

 

Conclusion

It is quite convenient even this plugin is still beta version for the moment, and this is what I am wanting for years to quickly implement program dealing both text and file. I highly expect GA version.

If you have any feedback, please post reply and discuss with me.

entry.title: Re: How to bring your ABAP custom code to SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi Olga thanks for this information is very helpful. I have a few questions:

1.- We can move custom programs (code) to BTP but what happend with objects as custom tables, custom data elements, custom domains. How we can move those ojects to BTP?

2.- The abapGIT plugin implies an extra cost to the client or is a plugin that we can use or download for ecplipse without cost ?

3.- So, abapGIT plugin is the unique tool to move the custome code to BTP?

Thanks in advance

Regards

entry.title: Re: Project scheduling in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Private Edi...
entry.content: I appreciate your quick and kind answer. Let me ask one more question. How about in Public edition? Is there any solution for this as well? Thanks.

entry.title: Representative Key in CDS
entry.content: We'd like to know choose different representative key in  custom CDS will have what impact.

entry.title: Re: How to clear the old assets value without depreciation
entry.content:
Hi Ernesto Cepeda,

Thanks for the reply.

But it doesn't help me to fix this issue. Our Client is using the ECC6.0 version still not using Hana/S4. The old asset stopped using after 2011. It was never depreciated and opened a new asset year for some reason. 

Please let me know if any alternate solution to clear and activate the current year.

Regards,

RajPal

entry.title: Re: Where can I change the Comany name in my P-User account?
entry.content: Yes Simple edit button would have solved the issue... I had to reschedule my certification and had to sent couple of mail to sap just to correct spelling mistake in my name...

entry.title: Re: appgyver with S4HANA odata source
Re: appgyver with S4HANA odata source
entry.content:
Cesar: did you managed to solve your issue?

I have the same exact problem when i try the app in android with preview app.

But with the webapp test option everything is alright

i am using SAP Business One Odata Conection

entry.title: Re: Problem when run command fiori add deploy-config
entry.content: i install with lower case "npm install -g @Sap/generator-fiori" and re run command again but still not working

entry.title: Re: Problem when run command fiori add deploy-config
entry.content: I solve this issue by using my other pc to run "fiori add deploy-config" command i dont know why my other pc work but my working laptop is not working all version of node package and nodejs version is exactly the same

entry.title: How to process intercompany transaction via IDOC in SAP S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
How to process intercompany transaction via IDOC in SAP S4 Public Cloud.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to process intercompany transaction via IDOC in S...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Regarding how to process intercompany transaction via IDOC, kindly refer to the following scope item for setup instructions:

  • International intercompany sales process
    • https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2402/SolP/1MX?region=DE
    • Setup instructions: https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/1MX_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf
  • Domestic intercompany sales process

    • https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2402/SolP/1HO?region=DE

    • Setup instructions: https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2402/SolP/1HO?region=DE

entry.title: Re: Problem when run command fiori add deploy-config
entry.content: my issue i think it is the same with this post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/error-at-fiori-add-deploy-config-cf-add-deployment-config-for-sap-fiori/qaq-p/12807279

entry.title: Usage and differences between MRS , RSH and FSM
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working on a requirement for  Resource Scheduling for one of our client.

SAP has 3 products available i.e. MRS , FSM and RSH.

Can someone tell me what are the usages of those and the differences between them? 

Thanks and Regards,

S Kumar
